framingZh: 构图跟着这个瞬间走，让同一个瞬间里的动作和现场先成立。
framingEn: close-up framing on the hand and the ticket stub being pulled from the bag's inner pocket
mustShowZh: 皱了的电影票根一角从书包夹层露出
mustShowEn: a wrinkled movie ticket stub being pulled from the inner pocket of a school bag
fingertips pinching the edge of the ticket stub
rain-streaked window glass visible in the background
mayShowZh: 书包拉链拉开一半的状态
mayShowEn: school bag with its zipper half-open
corner of a classroom desk or windowsill
a glimpse of the small red hairclip
mustAvoidZh: 将瞬间重写成不同事件
票根被放大成梦幻的风景背景
角色摆出与翻找动作无关的肖像姿势
mustAvoidEn: rewriting the moment into a different event
the ticket stub amplified into a dreamy scenic backdrop
the character posed for a portrait unrelated to the rummaging action
atmosphereZh: 像顺手留下的一段真实生活
altTextZh: 璃音收拾书包时，发现夹层里一张去年的电影票根。
